title: Limitless Optimizations
description: A modpack aiming to reach peak performance with the power of optimization mods and extreme performance configurations
body:
### 🚀 This modpack is not intended to be used on a daily basis, given the extreme preconfigurations that aim to minimize latency. Instead, this should only be used once to test what your PC can achieve.
##

### ‎ 
In Minecraft modding, more optimization mods is not always better. If you were to install every optimization mod out there, the conflicts they create together and the bare amount of them is going to backfire and hinder the performance. This factor alone makes optimization modpacks substantially harder perfect and overall to get one to be "more optimized" than others.

Yet, here we are. This modpack is the result of me going through dozens of optimization mods, installing all of the notable ones, and then one by one removing mods that do not really do anything and only slow down the game. But that's not all. Even with the best combination of mods, you still have to configure _each one_ correctly if you want to squish out all the FPS you can possibly get.

So that's what I did; I've preconfigured many of the mods to the extreme for the best performance possible. I went above and beyond, several aspects of the Vanilla game have been killed for performance. These include removing the lightning engine, entity rendering, sky renderering, particle rendering, and more.

This level of optimization is not found in normal "Optimized MC" modpacks (Because it's incovnenient for every-day use) So you're truly going to find results here you haven't seen before!
## 

<details>
<summary>Performance Details</summary>

| Setup                   | Results with [i7-8700K](https://www.cpubenchmark.net/cpu.php?cpu=Intel+Core+i7-8700K+@+3.70GHz) | Results with [Intel Core 3 100U](https://www.cpubenchmark.net/cpu.php?cpu=Intel+Core+3+100U)
|-------------------------|----------|-----------
| Vanilla                 | **1400 FPS** | **600 FPS**
| Sodium                  | **1900 FPS** | **640 FPS**
| Latency Nullifier       | **2400 FPS** | **700 FPS**
| Limitless Optimizations | **3000 FPS** | **1200 FPS**
| Limitless Optimizations (F1 Enabled) | **3800 FPS** | **1900 FPS**
> Tests are executed with minimal settings and in a superflat world. Go test it yourself!

</details>



‎ 
> 🎯 Since this modpack is **not** ideal for every-day use! I recommend people looking for the absolute minimal and lightest Minecraft experience to have a look at [Latency Nullifier](https://modrinth.com/modpack/latency-nullifier)
